Bus Timings

Dubai to Rashidiya by Road Review: Bus Timings and Fare Details

May 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Traveling from Dubai to Rashidiya is a straightforward journey, with several convenient options available.

Overview of Travel Options: Duration, Cost, and Distance

The distance between Dubai and Rashidiya is approximately 26 km, with a road distance of about 22.4 km. Here are the primary travel options:

  • Bus: The Dubai RTA Bus Line 102 offers a cost-effective and direct service between Global Village 1 and Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 11. The journey takes around 33 minutes and costs between AED 30 and AED 42.

  • Taxi: For a quicker journey, taxis can travel from Dubai to Rashidiya in about 15 minutes, covering the same 22.4 km distance. Taxi fares range from AED 230 to AED 290.
  • Car: Driving yourself from Dubai to Rashidiya takes approximately 16 minutes. The cost of fuel for this trip ranges between AED 38 and AED 55.

Transportation Details

1. Bus Route Details

Dubai RTA Bus Line 102

  • Route: Global Village 1 to Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 11

  • Average Duration: 33 minutes
  • Frequency: Every 3 hours
  • Estimated Price: AED 30 to AED 42
  • Website: RTA Dubai Bus

Catching the Bus

  • Departure Point: The bus departs from Global Village 1 station.

  • Arrival Point: The bus arrives at Rashidiya Bus Station Gate 11.

2. Taxi Services

Arabia Taxi

  • Phone: 04 2080 808
Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Website: Arabia Taxi
  • Average Duration: 15 minutes
  • Estimated Price: AED 230 to AED 290

Overview

  • Fastest Option: Taxis provide the quickest route, covering the distance in about 15 minutes.

3. Driving Your Own Car

  • Driving Time: Approximately 16 minutes

  • Fuel Cost: AED 38 to AED 55

Overview

  • Convenience: Driving allows for the most flexibility in terms of departure time and route.

Accommodation Near Rashidiya

There are numerous accommodation options available in and around Rashidiya, with over 10,445 hotels to choose from. Prices start at approximately AED 1,037.77 per night, catering to various budgets and preferences.

Additional Tips

  • Check Schedules: For bus travel, verify the latest schedules on the RTA website or contact their customer service for any updates or changes.
  • Comfort Essentials: For a more comfortable journey, especially if traveling by bus or taxi, bring essentials such as water and snacks.
  • Parking: If driving, ensure you are aware of parking options and regulations at your destination in Rashidiya.
  • Travel Documents: Always carry your identification and any necessary documents, particularly if traveling by taxi or car.

Traveling from Dubai to Rashidiya offers a range of options to suit different preferences and budgets. Whether you choose the affordability of the bus, the speed of a taxi, or the convenience of driving yourself, this guide should help you plan your journey effectively. Enjoy a smooth and efficient trip, knowing you have the best travel option for your needs.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 29, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
